hadith_entries.text:
861. Narrated Al-Mogheera ibn Sho'aba; 'The Messenger
of Allah said: "Do not abuse the dead lest you would harm
the living."
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)

862. Narrated Abu-Zarr; 'The Messenger of Allah
said
to me: "Fear Allah wherever you are. Follow an evil deed
with a good one to abolish it. And treat people kindly."
Allah said:
